findings.rationale: Static DuckDB aggregation over the internal transactions view; dynamic WHERE fragments are internal booleans plus exclude_transfers_sql(); see src/finjuice/pipeline/analytics/duckdb_layer.py:DuckDBAnalytics.monthly_spend.

DuckDB read patterns are resolved under transactions/ with quote_duckdb_path_pattern; selected columns are quoted with quote_duckdb_identifier; see src/finjuice/pipeline/analytics/duckdb_layer.py:DuckDBAnalytics.read_partitions.

The fixed partition glob is contained and quoted with quote_duckdb_path_pattern; introspected CSV columns are quoted with quote_duckdb_identifier and report filters use shared literal quoting; see src/finjuice/pipeline/analytics/duckdb_layer.py:DuckDBAnalytics.register_transactions_view.

Legacy analytics builder contains read_csv patterns under the current workspace with quote_duckdb_path_pattern and assembles only static transfer filter SQL; see src/finjuice/pipeline/analytics/query_builder.py:build_account_summary_query.

Legacy analytics builder contains read_csv patterns with quote_duckdb_path_pattern, quotes date literals with quote_duckdb_string_literal, and quotes requested column identifiers with quote_duckdb_identifier; see src/finjuice/pipeline/analytics/query_builder.py:build_date_range_filter_query.

Legacy analytics builder contains read_csv patterns under the current workspace with quote_duckdb_path_pattern and adds only static transfer/income predicates; see src/finjuice/pipeline/analytics/query_builder.py:build_monthly_spend_query.

Recent-mover SQL is static over the internal transactions view; top_n is cast to a non-negative integer before LIMIT interpolation; see src/finjuice/pipeline/analytics/query_builder.py:build_recent_spend_movers_query.

Legacy analytics builder contains read_csv patterns under the current workspace with quote_duckdb_path_pattern; top_n is cast to a non-negative integer before LIMIT interpolation; see src/finjuice/pipeline/analytics/query_builder.py:build_tag_breakdown_query.

Legacy analytics builder contains read_csv patterns under the current workspace with quote_duckdb_path_pattern; top_n is cast to a non-negative integer before LIMIT interpolation; see src/finjuice/pipeline/analytics/query_builder.py:build_top_merchants_query.

DuckDB query uses placeholders for user search/date inputs; WHERE text is assembled from fixed predicates chosen by CLI options; see src/finjuice/pipeline/cli/commands/explain.py:_search_transactions.

Validated read-only SQL is intentionally wrapped for count and pagination; validate_readonly_sql rejects non-SELECT, multi-statement, and restricted DuckDB file-reading functions; pagination limits are numeric CLI values; see src/finjuice/pipeline/cli/commands/query.py:query_command.

Validated read-only SQL is intentionally wrapped for count and pagination; validate_readonly_sql rejects non-SELECT, multi-statement, and restricted DuckDB file-reading functions; pagination limits are numeric CLI values; see src/finjuice/pipeline/cli/commands/query.py:query_command.

Validated read-only SQL is intentionally wrapped for count and pagination; validate_readonly_sql rejects non-SELECT, multi-statement, and restricted DuckDB file-reading functions; pagination limits are numeric CLI values; see src/finjuice/pipeline/cli/commands/query.py:query_command.

DuckDB query uses placeholders for user rule patterns; field names are already schema-validated and quoted with quote_duckdb_identifier before predicate assembly; see src/finjuice/pipeline/cli/commands/rules_cmd/mutations.py:_compute_rule_impact_preview.

Pivot SQL uses allowlisted axis expressions and month literals built through the shared quote_duckdb_string_literal helper before assembly; see src/finjuice/pipeline/cli/commands/template_cmd/execution.py:_build_pivot_base_rows_sql.

Pivot SQL uses allowlisted axis expressions and month literals built through the shared quote_duckdb_string_literal helper before assembly; see src/finjuice/pipeline/cli/commands/template_cmd/execution.py:_build_pivot_base_rows_sql.

Pivot discovery wraps SQL generated by allowlisted pivot builders; top-N and aggregate choices are validated, and dynamic pivot literals/aliases use shared DuckDB quoting helpers; see src/finjuice/pipeline/cli/commands/template_cmd/execution.py:_discover_pivot_columns.

DuckDB suggestion query contains static SQL plus internal transfer predicate builder; caller-supplied thresholds are placeholders for HAVING/LIMIT; see src/finjuice/pipeline/tagging/suggestions.py:_merchant_context_query.
DuckDB suggestion query contains static SQL plus internal transfer predicate builder; no user input is concatenated; see src/finjuice/pipeline/tagging/suggestions.py:_similar_merchants_query.

DuckDB coverage query assembles only static SQL fragments and internal transfer predicates; no user input is concatenated; see src/finjuice/pipeline/tagging/suggestions.py:get_suggestion_coverage_stats.
